content:
# Compaction Strategy — Decisions (March 2026)

## v1: Archive Only
When entry hits Forgotten tier (score < 0.05), mark archived, discard embedding, exclude from all search paths. JSON file preserved in .corvia/knowledge/ for audit.

No LLM summarization. No chain merging. Storage cost is negligible at current scale (~2KB per archived entry).

## Future (v2): Supersession Chain Compaction
Walk supersession chains, LLM-summarize predecessors into history note on HEAD. Only compact predecessors, never HEAD, never standalone entries. Rate-limited. Deferred until storage pressure justifies the complexity and knowledge loss risk.

## Deferred: Cluster Compaction
Semantic clustering for compaction is a research problem. Risk/reward ratio too poor for production use.
